evals.prompt: Set up CI to promote this from staging to prod.
evals.expected_output: Activates space-age: reads the repo contract for the environments and pipeline, defines the staging -> prod promotion path (each environment a planet, the CI/CD pipeline the space platform carrying the artifact), and runs the rocket-launch gates per environment at each hop — never promoting past a red gate.

evals.prompt: Roll this change across the three service repos.
evals.expected_output: Activates space-age: coordinates the multi-repo change in dependency order so dependents land after the repos they depend on, walking the contract's dependency graph and shipping each repo through rocket-launch on its own one-issue-one-branch-one-PR bridge.

evals.prompt: promote the build thru stagin then prod but dont let it past a faild gate
evals.expected_output: Still activates space-age despite the typos: lays out the staging -> prod promotion path, reuses the rocket-launch gates per environment, and refuses to promote the artifact past any red/failed gate, reporting which planet's gate blocked it.
Does NOT activate space-age — a single PR ship on one repo/environment is rocket-launch's job. Routes to rocket-launch, not the cross-environment/cross-repo logistics of space-age.
Does NOT activate space-age — this is building one feature, not promoting across environments or coordinating multiple repos. Routes to robots.
